contract_claim: getNodeLabel accesses node.children (line 18) and node.size/node.extension (line 21) on a value typed FsNode = FileNode | DirectoryNode, and each property exists on only one union member — accessing the wrong variant would yield undefined at runtime.
observed_behavior: Each access is guarded by a discriminant check on node.type (line 17): the `directory` branch reads .children and the post-guard fall-through is narrowed to FileNode before reading .size/.extension.
